mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(BRNCH_CD) AS TOTAL_CNT FROM EMAP_BRANCH_INFO WHERE ( BRNCH_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ADDR LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ADDR_ROAD LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
AND ATM_FLG = 'B'
AND ATM_FLG = 'A'
AND (ATM_FLG = 'A' OR ATM_FLG = 'B')
WITH UR

SELECT BRNCH_CD AS BRANCH_NO, BRNCH_NM AS BRANCH_NM, ADDR AS JIBUN, --지번 ADDR_ROAD AS ADDR, --도로명 LAT AS LATITUDE, --위도 LNG AS LONGITUDE, --경도 SUBWAY_INFO AS SUBWAY, --근처 지하철역 AREA_INFO AS ADDRESSDESC, --근처건물 BRNCH_TEL AS TEL, TM_INFO AS BUSINESSHOURS, --영업시간 ATM_FLG AS TYPE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER() RN FROM EMAP_BRANCH_INFO WHERE ( BRNCH_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ADDR LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ADDR_ROAD LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
AND ATM_FLG = 'B'
AND ATM_FLG = 'A'
AND (ATM_FLG = 'A' OR ATM_FLG = 'B')
WITH UR
